name: The last bug
prompts: Describe the moment the bug fired. Where were you? What did you see?
What's the first thing you suspected — and was it right?
How long between 'this is broken' and 'I know why'?
What signal would have caught this 24 hours earlier?
What's the gap in our process that let it through?
Whose name did you almost page — and were you glad you didn't?
What did the postmortem doc say that the team meeting didn't, or vice versa?
If you could re-run that day, what one thing would you do differently?
